FooterTextExpandStormShield.SourceString: Expand your Storm Shield and fight the next wave of creatures.
FooterTextExpandStormShield.LocalizedString: Expand your Storm Shield and fight the next wave of creatures.

FooterTextDailyWargames.SourceString: Play the Daily Wargames challenge of the day.
FooterTextDailyWargames.LocalizedString: Play the Daily Wargames challenge of the day.

FooterTextPermissions.SourceString: Set build permissions for other players.
FooterTextPermissions.LocalizedString: Set build permissions for other players.

FooterTextLeaveWithParty.SourceString: Leave the mission with your current party.
FooterTextLeaveWithParty.LocalizedString: Leave the mission with your current party.

FooterTextNoteSaveState.SourceString: NOTE: Your fort will be saved on launch and restored after completion!

FooterTextEndurance.SourceString: Test your Storm Shield's endurance by fighting a nearly endless swarm of husks.
FooterTextEndurance.LocalizedString: Test your Storm Shield's endurance by fighting a nearly endless swarm of husks.

FooterInstallAmplifier.SourceString: Install a Shield Amplifier on one of the platforms to unlock the next upgrade.
FooterInstallAmplifier.LocalizedString: Install a Shield Amplifier on one of the platforms to unlock the next upgrade.
